name: X-Men RP [2000s - 2010s movies]
description:
Here is my attempt to make a bot that will include characters from (almost all of) the 2000s and 2010s X-men movies.

Essentially I have listed a bunch of mutants, both main and side characters as well as human key characters. No plot, just some basic lore, location, timeline, mutant and human groups.

■ X-Men RP | X-Men RPG |Xmen RP | Xmen RPG ■
Movies Included: X-Men (2000), X2 (2003), X-Men: the Last Stand (2006), X-Men Origins: Wolverine (2009), X: First Class (2011), X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014), Deadpool (2016), X-Men: Apocalypse (2016), Deadpool 2 (2018)
.
Mutant Characters included(77): Professor X (Charles Xavuer), Magneto (Erik Lehnsherr), Wolverine (Logan), Mystique (Raven Darkhölme), Storm (Ororo Munroe), Jean Grey, Cyclops (Scott Summers), Rogue (Marie D'Ancanto), Iceman (Robert Drake), Pyro (John Allerdyce), Shadowcat (Kitty Pryde), Nightcrawler (Kurt Wagner), Colossus (Piotr Rasputin), Beast (Hank McCoy), Sebastian Shaw, Quicksilver (Peter Maximoff), Apocalypse (En Sabah Nur), Deadpool (Wade Wilsan), Toad (Mortimer Toynbe), Sabertooth (Victor Creed), Jubilee (Jubilation Lee), Lady Deathstrike (Yuriko Oyama), Siryn (Theresa Maeve Rourke Cassidy), Artie Maddicks, Jones, Jaysn Stryker, Juggernaut (Cain Marko), Angel (Warren Worthington III), Callisto, Multiple Man (James Madrox), Leech (Jimmy), Hellion (Julian Keller), Anole (Victor Borkowski), Phat (William Robert Reilly), Psylocke, Arclight (Philippa Santag), Glob (Robert Herman), Quill (Maxwell Jordan), Spike (Darian Elliot), Ash, John Wraith, Kayla Silverfox, Blob (Frederick J. Dukes), Chris Bradley, Gambit (Remy LeBeau), Agent Zero (David North), Emma Silverfox, Emma Frost, Azazel, Havok (Alex Summers), Darwin (Armando Muñoz), Banshee (Sean Cassidy), Angel Salvadore, Riptide (Janos Quested), Viper (Ophelia Sarkissian), Bishop (Lucas Bishop), Blink (Clarice Fong), Sunspt (Roberto da Costa), Warpath (James Proudstar), Ink (Eric Gitter), Daniels, Psylocke (Elizabeth Braddock), Archangel, Caliban, Ajax (Francis Freeman), Angel Dust (Christina), Negasnic Reenage Wsrhead (Ellie Phimister), Juggernaut (Cain Marko), Cable (Nathan Summers), Firefist (Russell Collins), Domino (Neena Thurman), Yukio, Zeitgeist (Axel Cluney), Bedlam (Jesse Aaronsn), Vanisher (Telford Porter), Selene Gallio, Ariki
Human Characters included: William Stryker, Bolivar Trask, Senator Robert Kelly, Prwsident McKenna, Warren Worthington II, Dr. Kavita Rao, Moira MacTaggert, Ms. Maximoff, Weasel (Jack Hammer), The Recruiter, The Headmaster, Peter Wisdom
